settings.title: Delivery & Returns
settings.content: Cairo & Giza: 2–3 days for in-stock pieces. International shipping 1–3 weeks. Bespoke & made-to-order pieces are non-refundable; in-stock items accepted within 7 days of delivery.

settings.title: Handmade Note
settings.content: Every piece is 100% handmade. Minor size variations of 1–2cm are natural and expected. For pairs, please order together so the fabric and finish match.
